summary: Validated monetization update end-to-end for requested scope: backend package catalog names/prices, lifetime checkout amount_total=4900, and Premium mobile-web UI copy/banner updates.

Checkout status for a newly created lifetime session returned amount_total 4900 and purchase_type=lifetime metadata as expected.
PremiumPacksScreen shows stronger 'Get All for $49' banner and updated pack labels in mobile viewport.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Public preview was reachable in this run. Premium route loaded in mobile viewport (375x667) and displayed requested names/banner. Backend verification executed against public EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL.
rca_of_issue: No blocking regression found for requested monetization changes.
